cells.rationale: Subtle correctness invariant in the deterministic-fold reducer: a boot re-anchored durable-expiry Reaper must close a double-dispatch hazard without liveness probes and preserve re-fold determinism plus the parked-sticky never-double-fire invariant, a nameable intelligence-bound reason that overrides the GPT-first default.

Decomposing a load-bearing okToPlan conjunction in the autopilot reconciler's decision core must stay byte-for-byte decision-identical while adding a transition-gated, rate-limited bounded-enum contract, a subtle correctness invariant plus stable-contract design that clears the opus gate.
